---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem, limitation, or user need.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Impact

Explain how this would affect gameplay, UX, maintainability, or development workflow.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, references, or other notes here.
